creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Try running `freebsd-update install` again to update userland or `freebsd-update IDS` to check your install if you think you already did.  Based off the version number, the system has not been completely updated to 10.1.

Sources:
"OpenSSH has been updated to 6.4." https://www.freebsd.org/releases/10.0R/relnotes.html 

"OpenSSH has been updated to version 6.6p1. [r264377]" https://www.freebsd.org/releases/10.1R/relnotes.html

Expected output on 10.1-RELEASE:
# /usr/sbin/sshd -p 44 -d
debug1: HPN Buffer Size: 65536
debug1: sshd version OpenSSH_6.6.1p1_hpn13v11 FreeBSD-20140420, OpenSSL 1.0.1j-freebsd 15 Oct 2014
